preview_text:
The model favors England at 61%, with Panama assigned a 13% chance of victory. The draw probability of 26% sits between the two outcomes, reflecting meaningful uncertainty despite England's clear baseline advantage.

The forecast shows England as the stronger side in expected output, yet the 26% draw probability and Panama's double-digit win chance indicate this is not a heavily skewed matchup. A draw ranks as the second-most likely single outcome, suggesting the teams remain competitive enough that separation may require extra time or a settled moment rather than dominance.

No sportsbook consensus has formed yet for this fixture. Once market odds appear, they will provide a second lens for comparison; the dashboard makes no claim to outforecast commercial bookmakers, only to represent the model's statistical view independently.
